attacking_style: Launches late-race attacks inside final 4km on steep finishing climbs, targeting GC contenders with explosive accelerations designed to isolate rivals and test recovery.
team_tactics: Limited team presence visible; appears to rely on individual opportunism rather than structured leadout or tempo control from domestiques.
terrain_preference: Steep finishing gradients where explosive accelerations can create immediate gaps. Final kilometers of summit finishes where sustained power meets punchy changes in pace.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to establish clear vulnerability patterns from single race observation, though earlier weakness referenced suggests potential consistency issues.
key_patterns: Attacks inside final 4km on summit finishes to force elite chasers to respond.
Targets moments that isolate weaker climbers from GC group on steep gradients.
Shows recovery ability mid-race, bouncing back from earlier weaknesses to launch late attacks.
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated recovery from earlier race weakness to execute aggressive finale attack
